lessons.title: Vehicle Accidents Involving Radioactive Sealed Sources
objectives: Describe immediate actions following a vehicle accident with radioactive sealed sources aboard
Establish control of the scene and protect the public pending assistance
cp105Topics: 10.1 Vehicle accidents with radioactive sealed sources

lessons.title: Fire Involving Sealed Sources
objectives: Describe the response to a fire involving sealed sources
Identify information that must be communicated to emergency responders

lessons.title: Source-Out Emergencies: Failure to Return to Shielded Condition
objectives: Recognize a source-out condition where the source fails to return to its safe shielded position
Execute the correct immediate response: secure the area, survey, and notify
Explain why source retrieval is reserved for specifically trained and authorized personnel
cp105Topics: 10.3 "Source out" - failure to return to safe shielded conditions

lessons.title: The Emergency Call List and Notification Duties
objectives: Use the emergency call list to make required notifications in the correct order
Identify the information each contact on the list requires
